name: Ownership Structure
description: Decompose a founding ownership split into building blocks, track readiness, assess importance, and work through each block systematically.

questions.question: Which area of the ownership structure do you want to work on?

options.label: Foundations
options.description: Vision alignment, founder assessment, roles & decision rights

options.label: Ownership frameworks
options.description: Axes, standards model, triggers, compensation levers

options.label: The decision itself
options.description: Starting split, big win scenario, option pool mechanics

options.label: Review the full map
options.description: Generate or update the ownership dashboard artifact

steps.name: Assess current state
steps.description: Review existing deliverables and score building blocks

steps.name: Work the focus block
steps.description: Facilitate conversation to produce the deliverable

checkpoints.question: Block complete. What do you want to do?

options.label: Share and continue
options.description: Share to Document Hub and work on next block

options.label: Founder review
options.description: Run founder panel review on what we just produced

options.label: Update dashboard
options.description: Regenerate the full ownership map with updated scores
